notes: Solid functional breakout with proper brick collision, paddle angle control, lives, levels, and high score persistence, but ball position isn't initialized before first frame (x/y are 0 until attached logic runs), and the launch angle math sends ball diagonally rather than cleanly upward.
A flawless and highly polished implementation of Breakout with perfect mechanics, audio synthesis, and game states.
A solid and complete Breakout clone with working core systems, but it lacks polish in collision fairness and reset/start behavior so it falls short of a top-tier benchmark build.
